title: finlaysonia maritima
intro: Finlaysonia maritima, also known as the mountain peppercorn, is a species of plant in the family Ebenaceae. It is a climbing shrub native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of various health issues such as respiratory infections, skin conditions, and wounds. Finlaysonia maritima can be prepared as a decoction, tincture, or powder, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
